title: Cobblemon French
description: French translations for Cobblemon - play with French Pokémon name while keeping Minecraft in English
body:
## Cobblemon French

**Profitez de Cobblemon en français !**

This resource pack provides French translations for [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon), allowing you to play with French text while keeping your Minecraft language set to English.

### ✨ Features

- Complete French translations synced with the official Cobblemon mod
- Automatically updated when Cobblemon releases new translations
- Version matched with Cobblemon releases for compatibility

### 📦 Installation

1. Download the resource pack
2. Place it in your `resourcepacks` folder
3. Enable it in-game via Options → Resource Packs
4. Keep your Minecraft language set to **English (US)**

### 🔄 How it works

This pack replaces the [en_us.json](cci:7://file:///Users/pierre/github/cobblemon-french/assets/cobblemon/lang/en_us.json:0:0-0:0) language file with the official French translations from Cobblemon. This means you get French Pokémon names, item descriptions, and UI text while still using English Minecraft.

### 📜 License

This resource pack uses translations from [Cobblemon](https://gitlab.com/cable-mc/cobblemon) under the Mozilla Public License 2.0.
